brief_text: Our e-commerce platform needs a unified search and recommendation engine for a catalog of 50 million SKUs. Search must support full-text, faceted filtering, and typo tolerance with p99 < 200 ms. Recommendations must include collaborative filtering (users-who-bought), item-item similarity, and real-time personalization based on the current session. The system must support A/B testing of ranking models without a full redeploy.
checklist: R1: The design must specify the search index technology and explain how 50 million SKUs are indexed and kept up-to-date
R2: The design must address typo tolerance and how fuzzy matching is implemented without sacrificing p99 < 200 ms
R3: The design must describe the faceted filtering architecture and how high-cardinality facets are handled efficiently
R4: The design must explain how collaborative filtering (users-who-bought) is computed and served at query time
R5: The design must address real-time session personalization — how signals from the current session influence ranking before any batch job runs
R6: The design must describe the A/B testing infrastructure for ranking models and how traffic is split without redeployment
R7: The design must specify how the catalog index is kept consistent with the product database (near-real-time sync)
R8: The design must address cold-start for new users and new SKUs with no interaction history
R9: The design must cover the offline model training pipeline and how new recommendation models are promoted to production
R10: The design must identify at least one explicit relevance vs. business objective trade-off (e.g., margin promotion vs. pure relevance)
